button.notficationFrequencyDropdown: open envelope with letter, toggles update frequency options

content.publicProfile: Your profile is currently public. You can change this in "settings"
content.privateProfile: Your profile is currently private. You can change this in "settings"

verifyAccountSection.title: Verify Account
verifyAccountSection.description: MAPLE requires our users to verify both their <bold>email address</bold> and <bold>phone number</bold> to be able to post testimony on our platform. We do this in an effort to reduce the number of bots that are able to publish on MAPLE.
verifyAccountSection.verifyEmail: Click the link in your email inbox from MAPLE.
verifyAccountSection.verifyEmailSpam: If you don't see it, be sure to check your spam folder.
verifyAccountSection.phoneDescription: Receive a verification code on your phone

position.endorse: The author of the submitted testimony endorses the bill.
position.neutral: The author of the submitted testimony is neutral towards the bill.
position.oppose: The author of the submitted testimony opposes the bill.
